title: TMasters Texture Blue Edition
description: Official TMaster texture pack that changes the GUI to a colorful blue.
body:
# The Official TMaster Blue Edition

The Official TMaster Blue Edition brings a cool, clean, and powerful redesign to your Minecraft experience. Inspired by deep ocean tones and electric blue highlights, this edition gives your game a calm yet dominant visual identity.

The main feature of the Blue Edition is the redesigned hotbar. The classic Minecraft hotbar is transformed into a smooth, vibrant blue interface that feels modern and polished. The balanced color tones are neither too bright nor too dark — creating a sleek and professional look that fits perfectly for PvP, survival, and competitive gameplay.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/877d3ed7cf8a265342cf68e061a24e9c3cf9fb6a.png)

This edition is made for players who prefer a cooler aesthetic while still standing out. The blue theme gives your inventory a fresh, high-tech appearance and adds a unique personality to your gameplay without changing the core Minecraft feel.

Just like the original TMaster Resource Pack, the Blue Edition keeps things clean and lightweight. It focuses on improving essential UI elements instead of overwhelming your game with unnecessary changes. Everything feels sharper, clearer, and more stylish.
